description: Xenodot Forge hooks — block destructive git/shell ops before they run, grant sub-agent game/library edits so backgrounded workers aren't auto-denied, deny ORCHESTRATOR game-content edits so it routes work to a builder instead of implementing (mirror of the sub-agent grant; enforces orchestrator.md), log sub-agent rtk-prefix usage (observe-only), log which named sub-agent reaches for raw grep search (Grep tool / grep|rg via Bash) so we can see who should get the graphify skill (observe-only), and (opt-in) refresh the game's graphify knowledge graph after edits (PostToolUse — AST-only graphify update; OFF by default, enabled per-game via graphify-out/.autoupdate or XENODOT_GRAPHIFY_AUTOUPDATE). (rtk enforcement itself is the user's own global hook, not shipped here — this only measures whether sub-agents follow the instruction.)
